---
title: "Report of the Commissioners appointed to Inquire into the State of Popular Education in England"
---

## Report of the Commissioners appointed to Inquire into the State of Popular Education in England

**Author:** Royal Commission on Popular Education
**Date:** 1862
**Imprint:** London: Eyre and Spottiswoode

### Notes

This book is available online in the series <i>House of Commons Parliamentary Papers</i> at
http://gateway.proquest.com/openurl?url_ver=Z39.88-2004&res_dat=xri:hcpp&rft_dat=xri:hcpp:rec:1861-037189

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
